predicates.name: is_surviving_spouse_of
predicates.description: The first person is the surviving spouse of the second person (the deceased).

predicates.name: deceased_leaves_ascending_or_close_collateral_relatives
predicates.description: The deceased person leaves relatives in the ascending line or close collateral relatives.

predicates.name: is_common_property_share_of
predicates.description: The asset is the share of the deceased in the common property of the spouses.

predicates.name: is_undivided_co_ownership_property_of
predicates.description: The asset is property held exclusively in undivided co-ownership between the spouses, being the share of the deceased.

predicates.name: is_own_property_of
predicates.description: The asset belongs to the own property of the deceased person.

predicates.name: is_subject_to_legal_reversion_4_24
predicates.description: The asset is subject to the right of legal reversion referred to in article 4.24.

predicates.name: is_subject_to_legal_reversion_4_25
predicates.description: The asset is subject to the right of legal reversion referred to in article 4.25.

predicates.name: deed_of_gift_excludes_usufruct_4_24
predicates.description: The deed of gift for the asset subject to article 4.24 legal reversion provides that the surviving spouse does not acquire the usufruct.

predicates.name: will_excludes_usufruct_4_24
predicates.description: The will provides that the surviving spouse does not acquire the usufruct of the asset subject to article 4.24 legal reversion.

predicates.name: deed_of_gift_excludes_usufruct_4_25
predicates.description: The deed of gift for the asset subject to article 4.25 legal reversion provides that the surviving spouse does not acquire the usufruct.

predicates.name: will_excludes_usufruct_4_25
predicates.description: The will provides that the surviving spouse does not acquire the usufruct of the asset subject to article 4.25 legal reversion.

predicates.name: acquires_full_ownership_of
predicates.description: The surviving spouse acquires full ownership of the asset as a legal consequence of inheritance.

predicates.name: acquires_usufruct_of
predicates.description: The surviving spouse acquires usufruct of the asset as a legal consequence of inheritance.

predicates.name: usufruct_4_24_excluded
predicates.description: The usufruct of the surviving spouse over the article 4.24 reversion asset is excluded by deed of gift or will.

predicates.name: usufruct_4_25_excluded
predicates.description: The usufruct of the surviving spouse over the article 4.25 reversion asset is excluded by deed of gift or will.
